node.text: Winrar, vlc player, winamp., we cannot forget in our life..
@harii7i MPC-HC
@harii7i also zarchier
@harii7i McAfee too
I hope he has his own room in heaven
@luzfrancisco72 HAHAHA
@jay_151520 he's still alive
Nope. Winrar’s creator passed long time ago. Now his brother runs the program.
Respect 🫡 button ————————>
Yes till this day it’s still working
So they just hoped people would pay when they can actually use it for free? Btw the payment pop up always made me feel like its gonna stop working.
@albert.akmukhametov ok..i get it now
@saimkhalid__sk they make their money off of enterprise contracts
@saimkhalid__sk there was no way to pay!
Others should learn from him
@devilzzbeat others ❌ americans ✅
Capitalists in general which is most of the world except like 5 countries I think
I bought a license on sale one time... Support the greatest
Are you from 9gag?
"So i made this thing, you can use it for a few days and I'd appreciate it if you paid for it later. Not that you have to really it would just be nice of you if you did."
Btw 7zip is light plus better.
Ohh nice 😯
@sachink1303 for some reason, I got a problem because it corrupt some file, that 7zip never get that problem with winzip
@sachink1303 man 7zip just wont extract in my D drive while my c is full, it insists on extracting in some temp folder in C and then copying to D, WinRAR has no such probkem
Bro invented open source
@philsgreat that's not what open source means
@philsgreat that's not open source at all bro
@philsgreat it's a freeware not opensource
But they collect infoooosssss annddd they sell it for adsenseeeee
@niksongjini thats fine. I trust winrar with my "invincible-S3-x265.zip"
@niksongjini they make money of businesses and not regular people. They are not chasing endless profits.
@naharajveer nice
there s a size limit tho
@smouniadi my ranked teammate
there’s a free $2500 code in my story
@saqlain._.zahid okay
@saboorrr._ account got hacked for bad reasons😭
Do you know a person who bought winrar?
@dj_a_k_s I know a person who knows a person who knows other person I think he also didn't buy
Legit grew up got a job and bought it just because it's a loyal tool.
Lot of respect bruh🙌
Святой человек
This guy and the guy who made "Where is my Train" app 🔥❤️🙌
For win you have to think different
İ am really sorry i use crack version 😢
@berke.drgrt libre lang Yun! Tanga! Download SA main site
@luzfrancisco72 My friend, that's exactly what I did; I just changed the license file. You don't need to get angry about it. Lol
Тут не хватает, что помимо предприятий и организаций, лицензию покупали японцы
@diananiknik откуда взял?
@elijusglv из статей про русско-японскую пиратскую войну 2026 года
